data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Bug not reproducible in current code. Zero occurrences of --version-bump anywhere in repo. All actual callers (sprint, end-session, debug-everything, VERSIONING.md) use --bump correctly. Catchall at merge-to-main.sh:758-760 is NOT silent — emits 'WARNING: Unknown argument' to stderr. Optional defensive alias could be added but low priority.
